hero.title: Capture any page. Send to any chat.
hero.subtitle: One click to deliver structured page metadata with your prompt into IM or AI Agent sessions.
useCases.knowledge.title: Personal knowledge capture
useCases.knowledge.description: Clip articles, docs, and references into your knowledge base with one click.
useCases.team.title: Team sharing
useCases.team.description: Deliver structured web content directly to your team chat channels.
useCases.agent.title: Agent / llm-wiki workflows
useCases.agent.description: Feed web content to AI Agents for llm-wiki workflows and persistent knowledge bases.
payloadExample.title: Example: Web Clipper - Wikipedia
payloadExample.description: A browser extension that saves web page content for later use.
payloadExample.content: A web clipper is a browser extension that allows users to save web page content...
payloadExample.prompt: Summarize this article and extract key points
supportedPlatforms.title: Supported Platforms
flowSteps.capture.title: Capture page
flowSteps.capture.description: Click the extension icon to extract structured metadata from the current page.
flowSteps.choose.title: Choose target
flowSteps.choose.description: Select an IM channel or AI Agent session from your history.
flowSteps.send.title: Send to chat
flowSteps.send.description: Deliver the formatted content with your prompt directly to the chat session.
trust.privacy.title: Privacy
trust.privacy.fact1: User-triggered capture — only when you click the extension icon.
trust.privacy.fact2: Local storage — all data stays on your device via chrome.storage.
trust.privacy.fact3: Direct browser delivery — content goes straight to the target chat tab.
trust.privacy.fact4: No remote server — we do not operate any server.
trust.privacy.fact5: No telemetry — no third-party analytics, tracking, or telemetry SDK.
trust.permissions.title: Permissions
trust.permissions.fact1: Production permissions: activeTab, alarms, scripting, storage, webNavigation.
trust.permissions.fact2: Host permissions scoped to known platform domains: Slack, Discord, Telegram.
trust.permissions.fact3: User-deployed instances receive optional per-origin grants at runtime.
knownLimits.telegram: Telegram shipped with live UAT pending — known risk, not primary proof.
knownLimits.feishu: Feishu/Lark evaluated and dropped from shipped scope due to unreliable shared URL targeting.
knownLimits.nyquist: Phase 11/12 Nyquist partial results are known risk only, not a delivered feature.
proof.status: marketing demo aligned to current UI contract
